title: Bridge Scroll - Open App
meta_description: bridge scroll opens the official Scroll portal for moving ETH and supported assets between Ethereum and Scroll. Verify domain, connect wallet, bridge.
hero_h2: Move assets between Ethereum and the zkEVM L2
hero_lead: Bridge Scroll is a clean route to the official Scroll portal for moving ETH and supported tokens between Ethereum and the Scroll Layer 2 network.
what_is: Scroll Bridge is the Scroll portal flow for moving supported assets between Ethereum mainnet and Scroll, a native zkEVM Layer 2 for Ethereum.

how.d: Start at the official app URL and confirm the portal.scroll.io domain before connecting a wallet.
Use a wallet that supports Ethereum and Scroll, then approve only the network prompts you expect.
Choose the asset, direction, and amount shown in the portal; keep gas available on the source network.
Check the wallet confirmation, submit the transaction, and track progress from your wallet or explorer.

points.p: The action happens in the Scroll portal, so this page should route users directly to the verified app instead of recreating bridge controls.
Bridge activity depends on the selected source network, destination network, token, wallet state, and available gas.
Blockchain bridges can carry smart contract and operational risks; ethereum.org has a neutral bridge overview for background.

faq.a: Bridge Scroll is an app-first landing page that points users to the official Scroll bridge portal for moving supported assets between Ethereum and Scroll.

faq.q: Is Bridge Scroll the official Scroll app?
faq.a: No. The official action should happen at portal.scroll.io/bridge; always verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: What can I move with Bridge Scroll?
faq.a: Use the official portal to see the currently supported assets and routes. Availability can change, so rely on the app rather than a static token list.

faq.q: How long does Bridge Scroll take?
faq.a: Timing depends on the route, network conditions, and the portal flow. Review the app status and wallet transaction details before assuming settlement is complete.

faq.q: Where can I read more before using Bridge Scroll?
faq.a: Start with the Scroll bridge docs and compare the instructions with the app screen before signing.

footer_note: Not the official app. Verify portal.scroll.io before connecting; educational information only, not financial advice.
